prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF THE CYCLOPHILIN-LIKE DOMAIN FROM BRUGIA MALAYI COMPLEXED WITH CYCLOSPORIN A. Entity description: PEPTIDYL-PROLYL CIS-TRANS ISOMERASE 1. Organism: Brugia malayi. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: generic_complex_not_assembly_required. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: channel_context generic_complex_only membrane_context_strong topology_evidence transmembrane_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. generic complex alone is not assembly_required_core. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public metadata indicates explicit transmembrane/topology-provider context
generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
reasons: public metadata indicates explicit transmembrane/topology-provider context
